content:
1. Google APIs
Google Custom Search API
  • Purpose: Web scraping, searching UCC filings, finding business websites
  • API Key Location:YOUR_GOOGLE_API_KEY_HERE
  • Docs:
    https://developers.google.com/custom-search/v1/overview
Google Maps / Places API
  • Purpose: Business lookup, phone numbers, location data
  • API Key:YOUR_GOOGLE_PLACES_API_KEY_HERE
  • Docs:
    https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/places/web-service/overview

2. OpenCorporates API

Purpose: Business registration data, corporate officers

  • API Key:YOUR_OPENCORPORATES_API_KEY_HERE
  • Docs:
    https://api.opencorporates.com/documentation/API-Reference

3. Clearbit API

Purpose: Company enrichment, emails, employees, domains

  • API Key:YOUR_CLEARBIT_API_KEY_HERE
context: From document: data enrichment strategy for ucc-mca intelligence platform — chunk 19 (chunk 19/32)
